data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified user choices reduce decision-making time and improve experience.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Ensures easy click targets and efficient touch zones for mobile users.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Complexity is handled at the system level to simplify the user experience.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users expect interfaces to function similarly to familiar applications.
data.technical_spec: Standard UI Patterns, Consistent User Interaction

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Aligning content presentation to human capabilities for processing information.
